subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the Kingdom when most of the servants turned away therefrom. Thus doth God recompense him who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الملکوت اذ اعرض عنه اکثر العباد کذلک یجزی الله من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
